name: Sampath
content: Before the Spiritual Intelligence (SI) program, I felt immense pressure at work, carrying the weight of being responsible for every outcome. That shift in perspective transformed me into a much lighter, stress-free person. I highly recommend everyone experience this training!

name: Namratha Gopinath
content: Before attending the SI program, I was confused and lacked consistency. This course helped me develop deep emotional balance and calmness. Diary keeping (spiritual journaling) has been especially impactful in identifying the divine presence in my daily life.

name: Priya Ganesh
content: To have a peaceful, blissful, tension-free life and enjoying God's role in each and every moment... the SI course is the most powerful tool. I have noticed a great change in my life after attending. I highly request everyone to attend and get the maximum benefit.

name: Karuna
content: This program completely changed my thought process and approach to life. With the divine knowledge shared, my health improved and I started dealing with day-to-day stress with so much clarity and peace.
